findings.detail: Source-level checks pass: 4 nodes (within 3-8 range), all labels are 3 words or fewer inside <b> tags, all concepts map directly to §5.7 corpus table, hitl classDef applied to HR (High cost/Cannot verify — critical stop cell), done classDef for both Low-cost cells, auto classDef for High-cost/Can-verify cell. Title set in frontmatter. No bare acronyms — Q2 axis info placed in subtitle spans. PNG visual check pending mmdc render.
